rationale: Bounded live-conditioning only. Corrects the score-based Elo delta by the gap between xG margin and score margin, capped at +/-8 Elo per match. Does NOT train on xG, does NOT replace goals, does NOT touch beta_elo. With only 4 xG matches available, the cap prevents any single fluky finishing/save streak from moving champion probabilities by more than ~1pp. Coefficient 6.0 chosen so a full 1.0-xG overperformance maps to a 6 Elo correction (< the 8 cap), and a 1.33+ xG gap saturates the cap.
source_note: xG source: Highlightly BASIC /statistics/{matchId}. TheStatsAPI per-shot shotmap would supersede as source when its plan is attached (currently PLAN_NOT_ATTACHED).
